address: 311 Main Street, Suite 14-A, Seal Beach, CA 90740
about_text: Founded in 1953, Applegate Plumbing & Heating is a family-owned business that has provided 70 years of local service. Our mission emphasizes the finest quality and guaranteed service available, along with expert plumbing design, installation and ongoing general plumbing care.

testimonials.text: Thank you all for always being there for us. We appreciate you and everything you do for us. We are so lucky to have such friendly, honest people to rely on!
testimonials.author: Tim & Jan

testimonials.text: Seal Beach Customer service at it's finest! They sent the crew out right away and had our mainline cleared out and working in minutes! Highly recommended!
testimonials.author: Joe

testimonials.text: We are 100% happy with the result btw. (I left that out previously thinking it went without saying.)
testimonials.author: Russ

testimonials.text: Thanks for your prompt and professional service.
testimonials.author: Fran

testimonials.text: Thanks Yvonne & Andy for your help. You're the best!
testimonials.author: Pat G.

testimonials.text: Thank you for your prompt service!
testimonials.author: Beverly

testimonials.text: Your crew did a great job!
testimonials.author: Dale

testimonials.text: Thank you, thank you, a thousand times to Yvonne for putting up with my phone calls, to Andy and Thomas for all your hard work, you're the best.
testimonials.author: Deborah

testimonials.text: Thank you for your continued service to our family and community. Your plumber was very courteous and cleaned up after he was through.
testimonials.author: Jerry
